productDisplayName: Forever New Women Puff Sleeve Tux Black Jacket
description: CompositionBlack tuxedo jacket coat with puff sleeves with an outer shell made of 96.1% cotton and 3.9% elastane and lining made of 53% polyester and 47% viscose, with single button closure on the front, buttoned cuffs, insert pocket on the left chest, insert pockets on the sides below waist and with a vented hem on the back FittingRegularWash care Dry clean only Cool iron on reverse if necessary Take feminine dressing to the next level with this black tuxedo from forever new. The black tux gets a fresh look with the puff sleeves and contoured design making it perfect for a formal dinner or cocktails. Team this with single colour mini dresses, stiletto heels and envelope bags for a cocktail evening or wear it with a sheer black top, skinny jeans and metallic heels for a rocking look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in coatsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
